description_long: This object is a decorative string banner composed of triangular pennant flags in alternating colors, suspended between two upright poles. The flags are attached to a thin horizontal rod or string, which is supported at each end by a vertical post, one of which appears to be wooden. The pennants are made of fabric or lightweight material and are colored in shades of red, blue, green, and purple, creating a festive appearance. The banner is designed to span a moderate distance, making it suitable for marking boundaries or adding visual interest to public spaces. The construction is simple, with the flags evenly spaced and hanging freely from the supporting line. This type of banner is commonly used for outdoor events, street fairs, or park celebrations.
description: A festive string banner with colorful triangular pennant flags suspended between two upright poles, suitable for outdoor events or street decorations.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the banner from an angle highlighting the left pole and the sequence of colored pennant flags hanging from the string.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the banner from the opposite side, emphasizing the right pole and the reverse order of the flags.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the banner from a side perspective, making the length of the string and the spacing of the flags more apparent.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a view from the other end, focusing on the left pole and the back sides of the pennant flags.
